title: Shared boards with Guests
excerpt: For each board that is shared with guests - there needs to be ability to have different permissions for guests. This would allow us, as the company, to only share the items the client needs to see - we have had to duplic…

posts.author: redbarn (Tracy Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: For each board that is shared with guests - there needs to be ability to have different permissions for guests. This would allow us, as the company, to only share the items the client needs to see - we have had to duplicate, link , and mirror as a clunky , time suck work around.

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tracy,

You can definitely customize permission settings for each guest invited on your workspace. You can check the Administration settings then go to Permissions.

We have a tutorial about being able to collaborate with external members or guests here.

Learn more about board permissions on this article.

Cheers!

Shanine from Mindflows
